title: Wasaila
description: Wasaila (What Agricraft Stats Am I Looking At) adds back Waila support for Agricraft
body:
What Agricraft Stats Am I Looking At (Wasaila) is a Minecraft mod which adds back Waila support for Agricraft.

Ever booted up Agricraft and Waila only to find out they no longer bundle Waila support?
Well now you're no longer forced to use The One Probe (even though it's a great mod)

The 1.16 version has support for Jade (it works with WTHIT but I recommend Jade)
Wasaila listens to Agricraft's "TOP only with magnifying glass" config option so when it's set to true it will only show certain info when holding the Magnifying Glass.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
